core_lesson: Copy is an action. Paste is evidence. The UI must make the next paste predictable.
reverse_influence: Adults and systems learn from simple user behavior instead of forcing users to decode machine logic.
karen_upgrade: GenZ Computer Wisdom: show the exact click, exact paste, exact result.
screenshot_lesson: One table copy button can corrupt a field-entry workflow.
rules: one copy block means one paste target
machine strings are withheld until explicitly requested
the user must know what happens after paste
